overlap.elss_overlap: 5 ELSS funds (Canara Robeco, Mirae, Axis, Bandhan, Navi) all hold Nifty large-caps — heavy overlap in top 50 stocks.
overlap.navi_duplicate: Navi ELSS Nifty 50 and Navi Nifty 50 Index are essentially the same exposure (₹25k+ combined). Exit one after lock-in.
overlap.bfsi_hidden: Banking+Finance true exposure: ₹1.59L across all funds combined — concentrated sector risk not visible from fund names alone.
overlap.ppfcf_international: PPFCF holds Google (4%), Meta (2.5%), Amazon (2.1%), Microsoft (2%) = ₹7,237 in global tech. No separate US fund needed.

watchpoints: Consolidate ELSS: post lock-in expiry, exit Navi ELSS + Bandhan ELSS — move to Canara Robeco (best performer) and Mirae.
Navi duplication: ₹28k+ in two Navi funds tracking Nifty 50 — exit Navi ELSS after 3-yr lock-in, keep Navi Nifty 50 Index.
BFSI concentration: true exposure ≈ ₹1.59L (26%+ of combined portfolio) when you include fund holdings — stay aware when adding Finance stocks.
No separate US/Nasdaq fund needed — PPFCF already gives ₹7k+ in US tech through its international allocation.
Review quarterly: update NAVs and check if active funds (Axis Small Cap, Invesco Midcap, PPFCF) are consistently beating their benchmark.
